name: SubscriptionPlanOrchestrator

neutralConcepts: executionOrder: IntegerCentsGuard=1, SETNX=2, OccRead=3, IntervalValidation=4, AuditWrite=5, OccWrite=6, Enqueue=7
priceCents must pass Number.isInteger() AND > 0 at ORDER 1 — float prices rejected before any write
storeDocumentWithOCC(plan, versionPin) at ORDER 6 — not plain storeDocument
billingInterval must be MONTHLY | ANNUAL | CUSTOM — checked at ORDER 4
storeDocument(audit) at ORDER 5 BEFORE enqueue(SubscriptionPlanPublished) — DNA-8

ironRules.rule: Number.isInteger(priceCents) && priceCents > 0 at ORDER 1 — float prices rejected immediately. CF-12-2.
SETNX at ORDER 2 — key=hash(tenantId+planId+version). Duplicate returns SubscriptionPlanPublicationFailed.
storeDocumentWithOCC(plan, versionPin) at ORDER 6 — NEVER plain storeDocument(). OCC_CONFLICT → SubscriptionPlanPublicationFailed. CF-12-2.
storeDocument(audit) at ORDER 5 BEFORE enqueue(SubscriptionPlanPublished). DNA-8.
billingInterval must be MONTHLY | ANNUAL | CUSTOM — validated at ORDER 4 before any write.

keywords: subscription plan orchestrator integer cents guard OCC write SETNX audit before enqueue billingInterval MONTHLY ANNUAL CUSTOM
